---
title: "Harrison's MSDM Project"
subtitle: "Proposal Presentation"
author: "Harrison Gan "
institute: "IBM 6400, Cal Poly Pomona"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format: 
  revealjs:
    theme: serif
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    footer: Harrison's MSDM Project
    transition: slide
    transition-speed: default
    incremental: false
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 1
    slide-number: true
    scrollable: true
    smaller: true
    code-fold: false
    code-overflow: wrap
    number-sections: false
    number-depth: 5
    embed-resources: true
    css: styles.css
editor: visual
execute: 
  echo: true
  freeze: auto
---

# Home Page

## Main Purpose: A Personal Statement

- My name is Harrison Gan, and I a currently a 3rd year student at Cal Poly Pomona. I am currently majoring in Real Estate and Marketing. I plan to get myself involved with the Real Estate industry and one day become a real estate developer. I believe that learning how to code data into a presentable presentation format will help me and my team understand the changing Real Estate market much more efficiently. 

# Marketing Projects 

## Purpose of this Page

This marketing projects section will showcase my work so far in data-driven marketing and analysis. This project page will be my portfolio that demonstrates my ability to analyze marketing data. 

---

## Example Marketing Projects

- Market Campaign Performance and Analysis
- Customer Segmentation for Data Analysis
- Website Traffic Analysis
- Device Platform Website Engagement Analysis
- Data Visualization Using Coding Techniques

## Skills Gained:

- **Data analysis** using R and the Tidyverse

- **Data cleaning and wrangling** to prepare raw data sets

- **Marketing analytics** through analyzing campaign performance

- **Data visualization** to communicate insights clearly

- **Dashboard creation** to track key performance metrics

- **Google Analytics interpretation** to understand website traffic and user behavior

- **Problem solving and decision-making** using data insights

- **Communication of analytics** through reports and presentations

---

# Dashboard 

## Purpose of the Dashboard

The dashboard page will display important data and metrics in a visual and interactive format. 
It will allow visitors to quickly understand insights from the data.

## Example Dashboard Content

- Website traffic trends
- Customer engagement metrics
- Marketing campaign performance
- Conversion rates
- Key performance indicators (KPIs)

## Skills Demonstrated

- Data visualization
- Dashboard design
- Data interpretation
- Communicating insights clearly

---

# Revealjs Presentation

## Purpose

The Revealjs presentation page will include interactive presentations that explain my projects and analyses.

## What It Will Include

- Presentations explaining data analysis projects
- Visual explanations of dashboards and results
- Step-by-step storytelling of project insights

## Skills Demonstrated

- Technical communication
- Data storytelling
- Presentation design using Quarto and Revealjs

---

# Google Analytics

## Purpose

Google Analytics will be used to monitor how visitors interact with the website.

## Example Metrics

- Number of users
- Website sessions
- Engagement rate
- Most visited pages
- Traffic sources

## Skills Demonstrated

- Web analytics
- Data interpretation
- Performance tracking
- Data-driven decision making
